titleStmt.title: SII 17.753: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 753. (A.R. No. 696 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀṞKAḌAL, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Kharapurīśvara temple.
The details of date viz., Śaka 1294, Paridhāvi, Kaṉṉi, śu 7, Sunday, Mūla correspond to 1372 A.D., September 5, Sunday f.d.n. ·16.

This damaged inscription seems to record the gift of money by Poṉṉuḷāṉ Mallināthar of Poṉṉūr and a transaction by the mabāsabhā consisting of the Bhaṭṭas and Viśishthas of Kāviripākkam alias Vikramachōḷa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a free-hold taṉiyūr) of Paḍuvūrkōṭṭam, in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇalīśaran Arirāyavibhāṭan bhāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭan śrīvirapokkaṇa
uṭaiyar kumārar śrīvirakampaṇa Uṭaiyarkku cellāniṉṟa śakābdam 10 2[9 10 9]n mel paridhāvi
varuṣam kaṉni nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mulattu nāḷ jayaṅko
ṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu paṭuvūrk koṭṭattu taṉiyūr kāvirippākkamāṉa vikramacoḻac caturvvetimaṅ
kalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷum viśiṣṭarkaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom Emmūr teṉpiṭākai Etirilicoḻa viḷākam
Emmuruṭaiyār tirukkarapuramuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār koyilil stānikaril parameśvara paṭṭar tevar kaṇṭaṟkkum meṟpaṭi nallūrāṇṭār vināyakapaṭṭaru
kkum poṉṉūṟ poṉṉuḻāṉ mallinātar tanta kācu vakai ka Oṉṟum Ivvūril kaikkoḷa mutalikku Eṉakku nallaperumāḷ
cakkaṟavattikaḷ tiruvekampamuṭaiyān virakaṅka lla ṉāyaṉār toṇṭaimāṉār poṉ
raiyāta Aḻakapperumāḷ kaṇṭa tirukkarapuramuṭaiyārkkumneṉ maliyi liḻa
lines 10 to 13 hopelessly damaged
yaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Uṭaiyār maṅkala
Digital edition of SII 17.753 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
